title: Frontend Development
description: Building responsive and structured user interfaces with attention to reusable components, content hierarchy, and maintainability.

title: API & Backend Integration
description: Connecting frontend applications with REST APIs, databases, authentication flows, and third-party services.

title: Content-Driven Architecture
description: Organizing websites around structured JSON and Markdown content without requiring a permanently running backend.

title: Testing & Documentation
description: Documenting development decisions, evaluating application behavior, and recording technical findings in a structured form.
